notes: Seed listing for Budapest Night demo — Szimpla Kert ruin bar.

document.name: Szimpla Kert
document.shortDescription: Iconic ruin bar in the Jewish Quarter — courtyards, live music, and Budapest nightlife energy.
document.longDescription: Szimpla Kert is one of Budapest's best-known ruin bars in the Jewish Quarter (Kazinczy utca). Expect eclectic rooms, street-food vendors, concerts, and a packed weekend crowd. Check szimpla.hu for current events and hours before you go.
